## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] No new emojis in UI strings or docs
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys, passwords, or other secrets
- [ ] No references to specific third-party AI providers in user-facing strings (use generic terms)
- [ ] Migrations are idempotent and reversible where possible
- [ ] User-visible changes are noted in the PR description
